items.title: Mathematics for Machine Learning
items.author: Deisenroth, Faisal, Ong
items.description: The spine of the curriculum. Provides the fundamental math needed to understand ML algorithms.

items.title: Pattern Recognition and Machine Learning (PRML)
items.author: Christopher Bishop
items.description: A comprehensive textbook focusing on Bayesian perspectives.

items.title: Information Theory, Inference, and Learning Algorithms
items.author: David MacKay
items.description: Essential reading for understanding information theory and entropy in ML.

items.title: Deep Learning
items.author: Goodfellow, Bengio, Courville
items.description: The foundational textbook for deep learning.

items.title: The Matrix Calculus You Need For Deep Learning
items.author: Terence Parr & Jeremy Howard
items.description: A straightforward guide explaining how to compute gradients for neural networks.

items.title: Essence of Linear Algebra, Calculus & Neural Networks
items.author: 3Blue1Brown
items.description: The absolute best visual intuition for mathematical concepts.

items.title: MIT 18.06 Linear Algebra
items.author: Gilbert Strang
items.description: The classic, deepest dive into linear algebra.

items.title: Harvard Stat 110
items.author: Joe Blitzstein
items.description: A rigorous and intuitive course on probability.

items.title: StatQuest
items.author: Josh Starmer
items.description: Breaks down complex statistics and ML concepts simply. Bam!

items.title: Fluent Python (2nd ed.)
items.author: Luciano Ramalho
items.description: Mastering idiomatic, advanced Python programming.

items.title: Effective Python (2nd ed.)
items.author: Brett Slatkin
items.description: 90 specific ways to write better Python.

items.title: Python Data Science Handbook
items.author: Jake VanderPlas
items.description: Complete guide to NumPy, Pandas, Matplotlib, and Scikit-Learn.

items.title: Python for Data Analysis (3rd ed.)
items.author: Wes McKinney
items.description: The definitive guide to Pandas, written by its creator.

items.title: numpy-100
items.author: Nicolas P. Rougier
items.description: 100 exercises to master NumPy vectorization.

items.title: calmcode.io
items.author: Vincent D. Warmerdam
items.description: Short, calm video tutorials on tools like pytest, wandb, and rich.

items.title: Machine Learning Specialization
items.author: Andrew Ng
items.description: The modern reboot of the most famous ML course.

items.title: Hands-On Machine Learning (3rd ed.)
items.author: Aurélien Géron
items.description: The best practical guide for Scikit-Learn, Keras, and TensorFlow.

items.title: An Introduction to Statistical Learning (ISLP)
items.author: James, Witten, Hastie, Tibshirani
items.description: The theoretical companion to practical classical ML.

items.title: Neural Networks: Zero to Hero
items.author: Andrej Karpathy
items.description: Building neural networks, autograd, and GPT from scratch.

items.title: Deep Learning Specialization
items.author: Andrew Ng
items.description: Comprehensive covering of MLPs, CNNs, and RNNs.

items.title: Dive into Deep Learning
items.author: Zhang, Lipton, Li, Smola
items.description: Interactive deep learning book with code, math, and discussions.

items.title: Stanford CS231n
items.author: Stanford University
items.description: Exceptional notes on CNNs and computer vision.

items.title: Stanford CS224n
items.author: Stanford University
items.description: Deep learning applied to natural language processing.

items.title: Hugging Face NLP Course
items.author: Hugging Face
items.description: Hands-on course mastering the Transformers ecosystem.

items.title: The Illustrated Transformer
items.author: Jay Alammar
items.description: The best visual guide to the Transformer architecture.

items.title: The Annotated Transformer
items.author: Harvard NLP
items.description: The original paper implemented line-by-line in PyTorch.

items.title: Lil'Log
items.author: Lilian Weng
items.description: In-depth, highly rigorous blog posts on LLMs and diffusion.

items.title: ESM-2 / ESMFold
items.author: Lin et al.
items.description: Evolutionary Scale Modeling (protein language models).

items.title: AlphaFold2
items.author: Jumper et al.
items.description: Highly accurate protein structure prediction.

items.title: ProteinMPNN
items.author: Dauparas et al.
items.description: Robust deep learning based protein sequence design.

items.title: RFdiffusion
items.author: Watson et al.
items.description: State-of-the-art generative protein design.

items.title: Hugging Face Diffusion Course
items.author: Hugging Face
items.description: Learn the theory behind diffusion models.
